patch:
--- a/counter_with_reset.v
+++ b/counter_with_reset.v
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 module counter_32bit(
   input clk,
   input rst_n,
   output reg [31:0] count
 );
 
-  always @(posedge clk)
+  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)
   begin
     if (!rst_n)
       count <= 32'b0;
     else
       count <= count + 1'b1;
   end
 
 endmodule
